languages.text: {n}Огоньки оптических сенсоров Декабалуса на секунду вспыхивают, а затем полностью угасают. Техножрец без единого звука, явно смирившись с гибелью и себя, и всего, что было ему дорого, подходит к установке и начинает извлекать причудливый механизм, который затем передает вам.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Огоньки оптических сенсоров Декабалуса на секунду вспыхивают, а затем полностью угасают. Техножрец без единого звука подходит к установке, извлекает анкер-ядро и протягивает его вам. Манипула с зажатым в ней предметом мелко вибрирует, словно сервопривод, приводящий ее в движение, за секунду стал неисправным. Декабалус униженно молчит, избегая встречаться с вами взглядом. {/n}

languages.text: {n}Decabalus's optical sensor lumens flare for a second, before fading away completely. Without a sound, the Tech-Priest, clearly resigned to the demise of himself and everything he treasures, walks over to the machine and begins extracting the bizarre mechanism, which he then hands to you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Огоньки оптических сенсоров Декабалуса на секунду вспыхивают, а затем полностью угасают. Техножрец без единого звука, явно смирившись с гибелью и себя, и всего, что было ему дорого, подходит к установке и начинает извлекать причудливый механизм, который затем передает вам.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Decabalus's optical sensor lumens flare for a second, before fading away completely. Without a sound, the Tech-Priest, clearly resigned to the demise of himself and everything he treasures, walks over to the machine and begins extracting the bizarre mechanism, which he then hands to you.{/n}

{n}Decabalus's optical sensor lumens flare for a second, before fading away completely. Without a sound, the Tech-Priest, clearly resigned to the demise of himself and everything he treasures, walks over to the machine and begins extracting the bizarre mechanism, which he then hands to you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}デカバルスの光センサーが一瞬輝き、その後完全に消えてしまう。音もなく、自分と大切にしているものをすべて失うことを受け入れたかのように、テクプリストは機械に近づき、奇妙な機構を抜き取り、それをあなたに渡す。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Decabalus's optical sensor lumens flare for a second, before fading away completely. Without a sound, the Tech-Priest, clearly resigned to the demise of himself and everything he treasures, walks over to the machine and begins extracting the bizarre mechanism, which he then hands to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: デカバルスの光センサーが一瞬輝き、その後完全に消えてしまう。音もなく、自分と大切にしているものをすべて失うことを受け入れたかのように、テクプリストは機械に近づき、奇妙な機構を抜き取り、それをあなたに渡す。

languages.text: {n}Decabalus'un optik sensör lümenleri, bir saniyeliğine parlayıp ardından tamamen sönüyor. Tekno Rahip, kendisinin ve değer verdiği her şeyin yok oluşuna açıkça razı olmuş bir hâlde sessizce makineye doğru yürüyor ve tuhaf mekanizmayı çıkarmaya başlayıp sana teslim ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Decabalus's optical sensor lumens flare for a second, before fading away completely. Without a sound, the Tech-Priest, clearly resigned to the demise of himself and everything he treasures, walks over to the machine and begins extracting the bizarre mechanism, which he then hands to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Decabalus'un optik sensör lümenleri, bir saniyeliğine parlayıp ardından tamamen sönüyor. Tekno Rahip, kendisinin ve değer verdiği her şeyin yok oluşuna açıkça razı olmuş bir hâlde sessizce makineye doğru yürüyor ve tuhaf mekanizmayı çıkarmaya başlayıp sana teslim ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los lumen de los sensores ópticos de Decabalus centellean durante unos instantes, y luego se apagan por completo. Sin emitir un solo sonido y claramente resignado a perder su propia vida y todo aquello que atesora, el tecnosacerdote se dirige a la máquina y procede a desmantelar el extraño mecanismo, que luego te entrega a ti.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Decabalus's optical sensor lumens flare for a second, before fading away completely. Without a sound, the Tech-Priest, clearly resigned to the demise of himself and everything he treasures, walks over to the machine and begins extracting the bizarre mechanism, which he then hands to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los lumen de los sensores ópticos de Decabalus centellean durante unos instantes, y luego se apagan por completo. Sin emitir un solo sonido y claramente resignado a perder su propia vida y todo aquello que atesora, el tecnosacerdote se dirige a la máquina y procede a desmantelar el extraño mecanismo, que luego te entrega a ti.{/n}

languages.text: {n}德卡巴洛斯的光学传感器光芒骤亮一瞬后彻底熄灭。技术神甫无声地走向机械装置，显然已接受了自身与其珍视之物尽数消亡的命运，开始拆卸那个怪异的机械结构，而后将其递给了你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Decabalus's optical sensor lumens flare for a second, before fading away completely. Without a sound, the Tech-Priest, clearly resigned to the demise of himself and everything he treasures, walks over to the machine and begins extracting the bizarre mechanism, which he then hands to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}德卡巴洛斯的光学传感器光芒骤亮一瞬后彻底熄灭。技术神甫无声地走向机械装置，显然已接受了自身与其珍视之物尽数消亡的命运，开始拆卸那个怪异的机械结构，而后将其递给了你。{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'espace d'un instant, les lumens du capteur optique de Décabalus s'embrasent avant de s'éteindre complètement. Sans un bruit, le technoprêtre, visiblement résigné à sa propre destitution et à la perte de tout ce qu'il chérit le plus, se rapproche de la machine et commence à en extraire l'étrange mécanisme avant de vous le remettre.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Decabalus's optical sensor lumens flare for a second, before fading away completely. Without a sound, the Tech-Priest, clearly resigned to the demise of himself and everything he treasures, walks over to the machine and begins extracting the bizarre mechanism, which he then hands to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'espace d'un instant, les lumens du capteur optique de Décabalus s'embrasent avant de s'éteindre complètement. Sans un bruit, le technoprêtre, visiblement résigné à sa propre destitution et à la perte de tout ce qu'il chérit le plus, se rapproche de la machine et commence à en extraire l'étrange mécanisme avant de vous le remettre.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Decabalus' optische Sensorlumen flackern kurz auf, ehe sie vollständig erlöschen. Der Techpriester hat sich offenbar mit seinem Ableben abgefunden, da er an die Maschine tritt, den bizarren Mechanismus ausbaut und ihn dir schließlich überreicht.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Decabalus's optical sensor lumens flare for a second, before fading away completely. Without a sound, the Tech-Priest, clearly resigned to the demise of himself and everything he treasures, walks over to the machine and begins extracting the bizarre mechanism, which he then hands to you.{/n}
